overview: I built 9 eval modules and a 4-section Responsible AI dashboard for my SAFe Feature System, starting from 48% coverage on 25 guidelines. Key finds: Reviewer consumes 80% of pipeline tokens, boosted PM context eliminated all invention-class hallucinations, and a 9.

keyPoints.title: System passed only 12 of 25 responsible AI checks
Reviewer agent consumes 80% of total pipeline input tokens
Boosted PM context reduced invention-class claims to zero
WEBPAGE scores 9.6 points below EXPERIENCE type average
Server-side verdict logic prevents LLM classification drift
